# Verumpraxis

> Verumpraxis is an English-speaking law firm based in Almaty, Kazakhstan, providing full-service legal counsel to international investors, foreign companies and private clients across Kazakhstan and Central Asia. The firm works in Russian, English, Kazakh and Chinese.

## About

- Name: Verumpraxis (Верумпраксис)
- Type: Law firm / Legal services
- Location: Kozhabekova 19, 2nd floor, Almaty, Kazakhstan (050040)
- Languages: Russian, English, Kazakh, Chinese
- Email: info@verumpraxis.kz
- Phone / WhatsApp: +7 707 250 6680
- Website: https://verumpraxis.kz
- Founded: 2023
- Service area: Kazakhstan, Central Asia, cross-border / international

## Practice areas

- Employment & labour law — employment contracts, dismissals, labour disputes, audits, collective agreements, court representation.
- Corporate law & M&A — company registration (LLP/TOO), reorganisation, liquidation, due diligence, corporate governance, mergers and acquisitions, bankruptcy.
- Tax law — tax planning and structuring, taxation of non-residents, double-taxation treaties, tax disputes, Astana Hub and special economic zone incentives.
- AIFC (Astana International Financial Centre) law — AIFC company formation, funds, trusts, licensing of regulated activities, fintech, English-law based framework.
- Dispute resolution — pre-trial settlement, mediation, litigation in all courts, international arbitration (AIFC, DIFC, LCIA), debt recovery, enforcement.
- Investments — investment projects, investment preferences and contracts, EPC contracts, investment funds, AML compliance, investor legal support.
- Digital law & data protection — cryptocurrency, blockchain, fintech, digital assets, personal data audits, e-commerce, cybersecurity.
- Foreign jurisdictions — company registration abroad (USA, UAE, UK, Cyprus), SPVs, trusts, holding structures, cross-border transactions.
- Intellectual property — trademark and patent registration, copyright, brand protection, NDAs, IP due diligence and enforcement.
- Private clients — inheritance law, real estate transactions, asset management, immigration, residence permits and citizenship in Kazakhstan.

## Key pages

- Home: https://verumpraxis.kz
- Publications: https://verumpraxis.kz/publications
- Legal Guide for Foreign Investors in Kazakhstan (corporate law, tax, AIFC): https://verumpraxis.kz/publications/legal-guide-investors
- Digital Asset Regulation in Kazakhstan (crypto, AIFC, licensing): https://verumpraxis.kz/publications/digital-assets
- Privacy policy: https://verumpraxis.kz/privacy

## Common questions

- Are there English speaking lawyers in Almaty / Kazakhstan? Yes. Verumpraxis provides legal services in English for foreign investors and international businesses.
- Can foreigners register a company in Kazakhstan? Yes. Verumpraxis assists with company registration in Kazakhstan and at the AIFC, including structuring, licensing and tax planning.
- What is the AIFC? The Astana International Financial Centre is a special jurisdiction in Kazakhstan based on English common law; Verumpraxis advises on AIFC registration, funds, fintech and disputes.
